page_title: Where to Eat the Best Apizza in the World? | TasteAtlas
page_h1: The best Apizza in the world (according to food experts)

places.name: Frank Pepe Pizzeria Napoletana
places.recommended_by: Andrew Zimmern and 10 other food critics
places.quote: The white clam pizza here is one of my favorite pizzas anywhere in the world. And yes, that makes me a Pepe's guy, if you held a gun to my head.

places.name: Sally's Apizza
places.recommended_by: Andrew Zimmern and 5 other food critics
places.quote: Why is it so crowded? 'Cause it's AWESOME. I get the plain pie here; it's perfect.

places.name: Zuppardi's Apizza
places.recommended_by: Laura Siciliano-Rosen and 3 other food critics
places.quote: Another good bet for a clam pie is Zuppardi's Apizza, as it's one of the few other pizzerias that uses fresh, rather than canned, clams—in fact, they shuck to order here.

places.name: Modern Apizza
places.recommended_by: Scott Wiener and 2 other food critics
places.quote: It tasted as good as it looked and fulfilled all my greasy cheesy needs.

places.name: Apizza di Napoli
places.quote: New Haven Apizza just like in New Haven.

notes: WebFetch was denied by harness permissions, so a Playwright browser scrape was used (TasteAtlas is JS-rendered and would have been mostly empty in WebFetch anyway). The /apizza/wheretoeat page contains exactly 5 listings (this is the complete list, not truncated). The listing page exposes name, city, country, street address, and a critic-quote per place, but does NOT expose any per-restaurant 1-5 numeric rating — TasteAtlas reserves the 1-5 score for the dish itself (Apizza dish score not shown on this page) and ranks restaurants by number of expert recommendations rather than by score. All `rating` fields are therefore null (not fabricated). The page also has an auto-rotating 'similar pizzas' carousel that, if left running, swaps the document into Pizza Napoletana / Detroit-Style / NY-Style / Chicago / Traditional Italian listings every few seconds; an early window.stop() was needed to capture the genuine apizza data before that rotation kicked in. URLs are direct TasteAtlas detail-page links and were captured verbatim from anchor hrefs.
